channel.title: himalaya on Últimas ofertas para ti

item.title: Himalaya Herbals Koflet-H Lozenges Orange Flavor Fortified with Honey Ginger and Essential Oils Support Sore Throat Cough Herbal Active Formula for Cough Relief - 12 Lozenges Pack of 3
item.description: Tienes Himalaya Herbals Koflet-H Lozenges Orange Flavor Fortified with Honey Ginger and Essential Oils Support Sore Throat Cough Herbal Active Formula for Cough Relief - 12 Lozenges Pack of 3 en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: CAREFULLY CRAFTED FOR SORE THROAT, SOOTHING COMFORT: Unlike anything you’ve ever tried before, Himalaya Koflet-H Lozenges provide a gentle and soothing tingle to comfort you seasonally or all year round. WISE ALTERNATIVE OF NATURAL LOZENGES: Koflet’s blend of unique plant-based ingredients and forest Honey provide a delicious note of breath-freshening flavor and offer a healthy new choice to those who enjoy the seeds of wellness found in Ayurvedic alternatives.
